_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of Application Security Risks (e.g. Open Web Application Security Project Top 10 list).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of LLM-specific security vulnerabilities, including the OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications (prompt injection, insecure output handling, training data poisoning, model theft, excessive agency).
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-001 (SP, cosine: 0.591), OP-K-002 (OP, cosine: 0.551).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.626). Shared vocabulary: [10, knowledge, security, top]. DCWF-only terms [application, list, open, project, risks, web] vs WIDAI-only terms [agency, applications, data, excessive, handling, injection] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.875 (P=0.902, R=0.850). P exceeds R by 0.052 — the DCWF element's 14 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (95.1%). "Knowledge of Application Security Risks (e.g. Open Web Application Security Proj" and "Knowledge of LLM-specific security vulnerabilities, including the OWASP Top 10 f" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.634 ≈ STS 0.626 (gap 0.007). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [10, knowledge, security, top] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.2%. Shared tokens: [10, knowledge, security, top]. DCWF-only: [application, list, open, project, risks, web]. WIDAI-only: [agency, applications, data, excessive, handling, injection].
